## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli (GrowthX.ai) and Zoe Weinberg (ex/ante) to explore potential synergies and share backgrounds.](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's GrowthX.ai: AI-native services company, $2M ARR in 5 months, focusing on content creation and AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Zoe's ex/ante: VC fund investing in tech empowering individual agency, privacy, and security](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [Mutual interest in AI, privacy, and enterprise solutions; potential for future collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
  - [Identified relevant companies: Thought AI and Knapsack for potential introductions/investments](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Topics

### Background and Current Ventures

  - [Marcel Santilli (GrowthX.ai):](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
    
      - [Previously at IBM, HP, HashiCorp (IPO), Scale AI](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
      - [Organized AI conferences with high-profile speakers (pre-ChatGPT)](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
      - [Founded GrowthX.ai: AI-native services, $2M ARR in 5 months](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
      - [12 employees, hiring rapidly](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
      - [Clients include Reddit, Ram, series D companies](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Focus on content creation, AI personalization, sales coaching](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

  - [Zoe Weinberg (ex/ante):](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
    
      - [Early-stage VC fund spun out of Eric Schmidt's family office](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
      - [Focus: tech empowering individual agency, privacy, security](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
      - [Investing in cybersecurity, crypto, web3, data infrastructure, AI, dev tools](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
      - [Background in conflict zones, World Bank, National Security Commission on AI](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
      - [Mostly pre-seed/seed investments, $500k-$1M checks](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)

### Shared Interests and Potential Collaborations

  - [Both interested in enterprise privacy/security solutions](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
  - [Marcel's experience with AI workflows aligns with ex/ante's investment focus](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
  - [Discussed potential introductions to relevant companies (Thought AI, Knapsack)](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Explored Marcel's fundraising considerations for GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)

### Industry Insights

  - [Marcel's perspective on AI adoption: focus on complex, mission-critical jobs](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Zoe's view on defense tech: need for broader focus including cybersecurity, privacy](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Challenges in consumer-focused privacy products vs. enterprise solutions](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to introduce Zoe to Mark from Knapsack](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=1912.0)
  - [Zoe to review GrowthX.ai's public information and consider potential portfolio fit](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)
  - [Potential follow-up on fundraising strategy for GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
  - [Explore possible introductions to ex/ante portfolio companies for GrowthX.ai services](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [Zoe to look into Thought AI and Knapsack for potential investment opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/kBy8r4sJ7mpuWKH8ddPNKoMqhGxZFdhU?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)
